completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith infra (NixOS flake), single host mandragora-desktop, single user m
Found extensive existing docs at repo root (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, DECISIONS.md, README.md, SESSIONS.md, atlas/*.md, install/INSTALL.md). Strategy: complement, do not duplicate.

Tech stack: NixOS flake (nixos-unstable), Hyprland/Wayland, NVIDIA proprietary 570.x, Btrfs + impermanence, sops-nix + age, home-manager. Architecture pattern: modular flake with strict separation of concerns (one concern per module file).

Conditional analysis: no APIs, no data models, no UI components in software sense. Skipped api-contracts/data-models/component-inventory generation. Documented modules/ structure, secrets pipeline, impermanence list, theming pipeline.
Source tree documented in source-tree-analysis.md with all critical directories annotated.
Dev workflow (Edit→Rebuild→Verify→Commit) and deployment (in-place rebuild + fresh install runbook) documented.
Supporting docs written: project-overview.md, source-tree-analysis.md, development-guide.md, deployment-guide.md.
Master index written. Existing index.md (directory listing of docs/) merged into bmad index — preserved superpowers/ plan/spec links.

skipped_outputs: api-contracts.md (no APIs in this infra project)
component-inventory.md (Nix modules already inventoried in source-tree-analysis.md)
resume_instructions: Workflow complete. To re-scan, archive this file and re-run the document-project skill.
